title: eBay 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing source for eBay's marketplace model, GMV, active buyers, live listings, revenue model, and competitive environment.

title: eBay Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization source for the snapshot valuation metric.

title: eBay P/E Ratio
note: Valuation source for the trailing P/E metric.

title: Buying vehicles, parts, and accessories
note: Product source for eBay Motors functionality, including vehicle search, parts fitment, purchase protection, and deposits.

title: OpenBazaar Features
note: Documents Bitcoin payments, multisignature escrow, dispute moderation, inventory, shipping, and encrypted chat for a decentralized marketplace.

title: Particl Marketplace
note: Documents Particl's decentralized marketplace architecture, escrow model, private markets, data storage, secure messaging, and open market protocol.

title: Particl Project GitHub
note: Public repository organization for Particl's open-source decentralized marketplace and related software.
